seoTitle: Tiwi Islands vs Top Springs — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tiwi Islands and Top Springs. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tiwi Islands vs Top Springs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tiwi Islands and Top Springs.
heading: Tiwi Islands vs Top Springs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tiwi Islands, Northern Territory and Top Springs, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Top Springs has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Tiwi Islands (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tiwi Islands or Top Springs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tiwi Islands has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Top Springs scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tiwi Islands scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Top Springs scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tiwi Islands or Top Springs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Top Springs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
